reasoning: Card body uses warm parchment/cream with rich amber-gold border trim and candy-pink scattered accents — all three map cleanly to the Echoes palette targets (parchment golds, sunset oranges, candy pinks). Corner details are warm brown, not cold grey. Shadow tones within the card are warm desaturated parchment darks, acceptable. The top ornament introduces the weakest area: deep crimson-brown hues that skirt the 'grim' boundary; they are technically warm darks (red-brown rather than cold near-black), so they pass the colored-shadows rule, but they pull mood slightly toward dramatic/dark rather than BRIGHT/WARM. The three display-canvas backgrounds in the zoom sheet are cold neutral dark-grey (#3a3a3a range) — these are not asset colors, but they suppress the brightness impression during review. Intrinsic card harmony is good; saturation is moderate-high on border and accents; no muddy desaturated areas or cold corporate tones. Score 7: warm and palette-compatible overall, marginal due to ornament darkness ceiling and no saturated greens or sky blues present to complete the full target palette range.
